evaluation_scope.goal: Probe whether Prometeo can act as a practical Python-to-C front-end for EquiBench OJ Python cases.

attempts.name: pypi_install_on_system_python
attempts.detail: pip install prometeo-dsl rejected on Python 3.14.3 because available releases declare Requires-Python <3.10.

attempts.name: source_install_on_python_3_10
attempts.detail: Editable install from the cloned GitHub repository succeeded only after forcing PIP_IGNORE_REQUIRES_PYTHON=1 and installing dependencies manually.

attempts.name: build_cpmt_backend_default_target
attempts.detail: prometeo/cpmt/make install_shared failed because the vendored BLASFEO submodule defaulted to TARGET=X64_INTEL_HASWELL and attempted x86_64 assembly on an arm64 host.

attempts.name: build_cpmt_backend_generic_target
attempts.detail: make TARGET=GENERIC CC=clang install_shared built libblasfeo.so but still failed to link libcpmt.so because required symbols remained unresolved on arm64.

attempts.name: boot_cli_help
attempts.detail: pmt --help failed before argument parsing because prometeo imports its linalg runtime at module import time and immediately tries to dlopen prometeo/lib/blasfeo/libblasfeo.so.

attempts.name: official_helloworld_probe
attempts.detail: pmt helloworld.py --cgen=False failed with the same boot-time missing-libblasfeo.so error, so the official example did not reach parsing or code generation.

attempts.name: equibench_case_probe
attempts.detail: pmt on goeq-oja-0004/source/prog_a/original.py failed with the same boot-time missing-libblasfeo.so error. No EquiBench case reached parsing.

case_results.reason: Prometeo never reached case-level parsing because the CLI failed during import/runtime boot.

bottom_line: Prometeo is not currently a practical Python-to-C front-end for the repository's EquiBench OJ Python intake on this host.
